theorem procedural_noZeroDivisors_tfae_92ef5e52fe64 : (∀ {ι : Type _} {R : ι → Type _} {S : ι → Type _} [(i : ι) → NonUnitalNonAssocSemiring (R i)]
    [(i : ι) → NonUnitalNonAssocSemiring (S i)] (e : (i : ι) → R i ≃+* S i),
    (RingEquiv.piCongrRight e).symm = RingEquiv.piCongrRight fun i => (e i).symm) →
  (True →
    (∀ {R : Type _} [NonUnitalNonAssocRing R],
      [NoZeroDivisors R, IsLeftCancelMulZero R, IsRightCancelMulZero R, IsCancelMulZero R].TFAE)) := by
  sorry

theorem procedural_IsIdempotentElem_sub_iff_31f30654ba08 : ((∀ {R : Type _} [NonUnitalNonAssocRing R] {r : R},
      IsRegular r ↔ (∀ (x : R), r * x = 0 → x = 0) ∧ ∀ (x : R), x * r = 0 → x = 0) →
    (∀ {R : Type _} [NonUnitalRing R] [IsAddTorsionFree R] {p q : R} (hp : IsIdempotentElem p)
      (hq : IsIdempotentElem q), IsIdempotentElem (q - p) ↔ p * q = p ∧ q * p = p)) ∧
  (∀ {R : Type _} [NonUnitalNonAssocRing R] {r : R},
    IsRegular r ↔ (∀ (x : R), r * x = 0 → x = 0) ∧ ∀ (x : R), x * r = 0 → x = 0) := by
  sorry
tasks.title: Procedural IsIdempotentElem.sub_iff
tasks.type_expr:
((∀ {R : Type _} [NonUnitalNonAssocRing R] {r : R},
      IsRegular r ↔ (∀ (x : R), r * x = 0 → x = 0) ∧ ∀ (x : R), x * r = 0 → x = 0) →
    (∀ {R : Type _} [NonUnitalRing R] [IsAddTorsionFree R] {p q : R} (hp : IsIdempotentElem p)
      (hq : IsIdempotentElem q), IsIdempotentElem (q - p) ↔ p * q = p ∧ q * p = p)) ∧
  (∀ {R : Type _} [NonUnitalNonAssocRing R] {r : R},
    IsRegular r ↔ (∀ (x : R), r * x = 0 → x = 0) ∧ ∀ (x : R), x * r = 0 → x = 0)
